Executable application assembly and runtime composition boundary. It starts the S3 WebFlux application, starts the admin/static Netty server, selects the object-store backend, and serves static UI/docs/report assets copied into bootstrap-application during generate-resources. bootstrap-application, rather than admin-api-adapter, owns the static assets.
